titleStmt.title: SII 32, part 2, no. 128: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 128. (A.R. No. 129 of 1911.) TIRUVIRĀMĒŚVARAM, MANNARGUDI TALUK, TANJAVUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the south wall of the maṇḍapa in front of the central shrine, Rāmanāthēśvara temple.

This is damaged in the middle and at the end. Records an order issued by Periya Tirumañjuṉappitar taking note of the lands granted by several donors for the provisions of food offerings to the god, Mahādēva of Tiruvirāmēśvaram at Madanamañjarichaturvēdimaṅgalam, a brahmadēyam in Neṉmali-nāḍu during the three sandhis as (tirumaḍappaḷḷippuṟam). Provision had also been made for burning six perpetual lamps to the same deity. A maṉai (shed ?) was also set-apart for storing manure (to be applied to the lands already endowed to the temple). Lastly it is also mentioned that Śrīdhara kramavittar granted a plot of land for half-a-lamp and he also deposited kāśu in the temple treasury to free land of taxes.
Published in S.I.I., Vol. XIX No. 322.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . kopparakecaripaṉmaṟku yāṇṭu 10 3Āvatu nenmalināṭṭu brahmadeyam matanamañcaricaturvvetimaṅkalattu tiruvirāmiśvarattu mahādevar nilaṅkaḷ periya tirumañcuṇappittar niyokappaṭi nivantañ ceyta pari kañ ceṉnelarici nāṉāḻiyun tūpparuppu Irunāḻiyum teṅkāy Oṉṟum veṇponakañ ceṉnellarici Aṟunāḻiyum Uccampotai sandhikku ceṉ nelarici kuṟuṇi
yiru nāḻiyum Ardhayāmattukku ceṉnelarici kuṟuṇi yirunāḻiyum Aṭhandikāryyattukku muḻākkum kṣetrapālaṉukku Ay Uḻakkum nālu sandhikku neyyamurtu Aṭhandikāryyat toṉoṭokkum nāḻiyāl nāṉāḻiyum kummāyattukku nāḻip paruppum kummāyamum poṟikkaṟimuṭpaṭa potu nālu kaṟiyamirtum Āḻvārkku Aṭaikkāyamirtu po ku viṟa
kukku muṭpaṭa Iccuṭṭappaṭṭa paṭimāṟṟukku vaiytta nilam vireśvaravāykkālukku kiḻakku mutaṟ kuṭumpil talaippāṭakattu vasamukkāṇiyum mitaṉoṭumaṭaiya Iraṇṭāṅkuṭumpu talaippāṭakattu � Araikkāṇiyu mānattaṅ kallakkūṭina nila kāṇi Araiye nāṉku māc cinnamum paṟpanābhavāykkālukku meṟku Ittevar toṭṭattukkuk kiḻakku nāṟṟukkāl Oru mākkā(kar)ṇiyum Āṟu kuṭumpil Iraṇṭām pāṭakam kuṇṭur caṉnakumāra kramavittaṉiṭai vilaikoṇṭa nilam Arai
kkāṇic ciṉṉamum tirumaṭaippaḷḷippuṟamāka vaittatu Innilattukku Eruvaṭṭa vaiytta manaiyāvana tiruvātiraicceri miyciṟakillaṟai pāṭaka nālu nontā viḷakku Āṟukku Iravum pakalum Erikka vaitta nilam panmanābhavāykkālukku kiḻakku muṉṟāṅ kuṭumpil talaippāṭakattukku kiḻakkaṭaiya kokkarai Amaṉattac comāci paṭṭālakaṉ vaitta nilam
pāṭakattu meṟkaṭaiya nilam Araikkālum Āka nilam Eḻumāvaraiyum (1/2) 8- ṅ kuṭumpil talaippāṭakam panmanābhavāykkāliṉ kiḻai neṭukiṉ �ṇiyum Āka nilam Eṭṭu mā mukkāṇiyum Ātittavatikku vaṭakku Iraṇṭāṅkaṇṇāṟṟu raṇṭāṅ kuṭumpil muṉṟām pāṭakattuk kuṇṭur śrīdharakramavittar Arai viḷakkukku vaitta nilam tevar bhaṇṭārattuk kācu kuṭuttu Iṟaiyiḻittiṉa nilam Oru māvarai
Digital edition of SII 32, part 2, no. 128 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
